system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_danhsach_dexuat_getall","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DANHSACH_DEXUAT_GETALL]
(
  @nhom_dexuat nvarchar(50),
  @trangthai_dexuat int
)
AS
SELECT A.*, dbo.getQuyTrinhXetDuyet (A.nhom_dexuat, a.id) AS quytrinh
INTO #DANHSACH_DEXUAT
FROM (SELECT 'BANGMAU' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             sophieu,
             ngaydexuat,
             mucdich,
             nguoitao
      FROM tr_dexuat_bangmau
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'MUAHANG' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             sophieu,
             ngaythang,
             noidung,
             nguoiyeucau
      FROM tr_phieuyeucau_muahang
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'MUAPHOI' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             sophieu,
             ngaydexuat,
             mucdich,
             nguoidexuat
      FROM dqt_dexuat_phoi
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'XUATKHO' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), sophieu) AS sophieu,
             ngaytao,
             mucdich,
             nguoitao
      FROM tr_phieuyeucau
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'DENGHITHANHTOAN' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             sophieu,
             ngaytao, 
             noidung, 
             nguoitao
      FROM tr_denghi_thanhtoan
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'DONDATHANG' AS nhom_dexuat,
             maddh AS id,
             maddh as sophieu,
             create_date, 
             loaiddh as noidung, 
             create_by
      FROM tr_dondathang
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'DONHANG' AS nhom_dexuat,
             order_number AS id,
             order_number as sophieu,
             create_date, 
             [range] as noidung, 
             create_by
      FROM tr_order
      WHERE f_cancelled = 'N'
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'DONHANGBU' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) as id,
             donhang as sophieu,
             ngaytao, 
             ghichu as noidung, 
             nguoitao
      FROM tr_order_replacement
      WHERE active = 1
      UNION ALL
      SELECT 'KYTHUAT' AS nhom_dexuat,
             CONVERT (NVARCHAR (50), id) AS id,
             sophieu,
             ngaytao,
             noidungcanthaydoi,
             nguoitao
      FROM tr_thaydoi_kythuat
      WHERE active = 1) A


IF @nhom_dexuat = 'ALL'
BEGIN
  SELECT A.*, B.vitri_xetduyet, B.trangthai_dexuat2, C.DepartmentCode
  FROM #DANHSACH_DEXUAT A
       INNER JOIN tr_danhsach_dexuat B
          ON A.nhom_dexuat = B.nhom_dexuat AND B.ma_dexuat = A.id
       INNER JOIN SYS_USER C ON A.nguoitao = C.UserName          
  WHERE B.trangthai_dexuat = CASE @trangthai_dexuat 
                                WHEN 1 THEN CAST(1 AS BIT)
                                WHEN 0 THEN CAST(0 AS BIT)
                                ELSE B.trangthai_dexuat
                             END
  ORDER BY A.ngaydexuat DESC
END
ELSE
BEGIN
  SELECT A.*, B.vitri_xetduyet, B.trangthai_dexuat2, C.DepartmentCode
  FROM #DANHSACH_DEXUAT A
       INNER JOIN tr_danhsach_dexuat B
          ON A.nhom_dexuat = B.nhom_dexuat AND B.ma_dexuat = A.id
       INNER JOIN SYS_USER C ON A.nguoitao = C.UserName
  WHERE B.trangthai_dexuat = CASE @trangthai_dexuat 
                                WHEN 1 THEN CAST(1 AS BIT)
                                WHEN 0 THEN CAST(0 AS BIT)
                                ELSE B.trangthai_dexuat
                             END
    AND B.nhom_dexuat = @nhom_dexuat
  ORDER BY A.ngaydexuat DESC
END
DROP TABLE #DANHSACH_DEXUAT","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.dqt_dexuat_phoi","dbo.sys_user","dbo.tr_danhsach_dexuat","dbo.tr_denghi_thanhtoan","dbo.tr_dexuat_bangmau","dbo.tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_replacement","dbo.tr_phieuyeucau","dbo.tr_phieuyeucau_muahang","dbo.tr_thaydoi_kythuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
